method.en: From this level's entrances/exits on the source wiki.
method.fr: D'après les entrées/sorties de ce niveau sur le wiki source.

en.name: Level 83 — The Sunken Submarine
en.shortDescription: A functional sunken nuclear submarine on the seafloor, stocked with endless food and crewed by a friendly permanent staff.
en.atmosphere: Deep underwater, dim artificial light and the constant creak of pressure, occasionally watched by a colossal entity outside.
en.tips: Stay calm if the Great Observer appears at a window. Use the escape hatch to reach Level 7 — brace for the water pressure.
